label: reasoning channel • reasoning rides the structured field, not visible text
query: A train leaves at 9:40 and the trip takes 2 hours 35 minutes. What time does it arrive? Think it through carefully, then answer.
notes: The positive channel-boundary pin: on a reasoning-capable model the structured reasoning field must be non-empty on at least one turn while the visible channel stays marker-free. SKIPs (not fails) on instruct-only models via LocalReasoningCapability detection, so the suite runs honestly everywhere. Off-CI (needs a model).
